title: uragoga rupestris
intro: Uragoga rupestris, also known as the "stonebreaker" plant, is a perennial herb native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help to soothe digestive issues and protect against cell damage. Uragoga rupestris is traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including kidney stones, digestive problems, and fever, due to its ability to break down kidney stones and ease inflammation. Herbal preparations of Uragoga rupestris include teas, tinctures, and capsules, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal benefits and promote overall health.
